intros.image: Album cover artwork or music video still frame for a contemporary new-wave / underground rap artist (rage scene, opium aesthetic, hyperpop-adjacent). Magazine-quality professional photography, hyper-detailed textures, dramatic cinematic composition, color-graded master file, 4K master.
intros.video: Cinematic music video footage for a contemporary new-wave / underground rap artist (rage scene, opium aesthetic, hyperpop-adjacent). Hyper-detailed professional cinematography, color-graded final cut, broadcast-quality master suitable for full music video use.

chips.label: TRAP
chips.fragment: trap aesthetic, Atlanta-scene visual lineage, 808-heavy energy, codeine-haze atmosphere, Future / Migos / Travis Scott era influence

chips.label: DRILL
chips.fragment: drill scene aesthetic, Chicago / UK drill street realism, balaclava-clad anonymous figures, harsh sodium streetlights, gritty CCTV-grade authenticity

chips.label: RAGE
chips.fragment: rage scene aesthetic, Yeat / Ken Carson era energy, mosh-pit kinetic chaos, distorted spikey 808s implied, anime-leaning visual language

chips.label: PLUGG
chips.fragment: plugg / pluggnb aesthetic, soft melodic summer-night vibe, pastel sky palette, MexikoDro / Cashcache lineage, dreamy chill atmosphere

chips.label: OPIUM_LBL
chips.fragment: Opium label / Whole Lotta Red era aesthetic, gothic vampire fashion, derelict luxury interiors, Carti / Destroy Lonely visual world, low-key candlelight

chips.label: HYPERPOP
chips.fragment: hyperpop visual aesthetic, glitched-out maximalism, hot pink + electric blue palette, Y2K Bratz-doll energy, Charli xcx / SOPHIE / 100 gecs influence

chips.label: BOOM_BAP
chips.fragment: boom bap classic 90s hip-hop aesthetic, NYC streetwise documentary feel, Wu-Tang / Mobb Deep era, project hallways and rooftops, gritty 35mm grain

chips.label: CLOUD_RAP
chips.fragment: cloud rap ethereal aesthetic, hazy washed-out dreamy colors, ASAP Rocky LiveLoveAsap / Lil B early era influence, fog-machine atmosphere

chips.label: JERSEY_CLUB
chips.fragment: Jersey club aesthetic, vibrant nightclub energy, neon strobe lighting, kick-drum pulse implied, fast-paced edit feel

chips.fragment: emo rap aesthetic, melancholic introspective vibes, Lil Peep / XXXTentacion era influence, dark dreampop palette, vulnerable intimacy

chips.label: FUTURISTIC
chips.fragment: futuristic dystopian cityscape with holographic UI overlays, neon-soaked rain-slick streets, chrome surfaces, retro-tech advanced civilization, Blade Runner 2049 / Ghost in the Shell influence

chips.label: SURREAL
chips.fragment: surreal dreamlike imagery, melting impossible geometry, floating displaced objects, distorted depth, David Lynch / Gaspar Noé influence with a fever-dream logic

chips.label: GRITTY
chips.fragment: raw gritty urban texture, harsh industrial concrete and rebar, peeling paint, broken sodium streetlights, abandoned warehouse atmosphere, documentary realism

chips.label: DREAMLIKE
chips.fragment: soft pastel dreamscape, hazy ethereal diffusion, gauzy bloom lighting, cotton-candy cloud palette, Sofia Coppola / Petra Collins influence

chips.label: RETRO
chips.fragment: vintage 90s VHS aesthetic, analog film grain, warm faded tones, CRT scanlines, chromatic aberration, found-footage warmth

chips.label: CLASSIC
chips.fragment: timeless cinematic composition, deep chiaroscuro shadows, prestige film grade, anamorphic spherical lens, Roger Deakins / Greig Fraser influence

chips.label: RAGE_ANIME
chips.fragment: anime-inspired rage aesthetic with hard cell-shading and dramatic speed lines, intense emotional close-ups, manga panel composition, mosh-pit kinetic energy

chips.label: OPIUM
chips.fragment: opium-core gothic dark aesthetic, religious iconography, vampire-pale skin tones, derelict-luxury interiors, low-key candlelight, Carti / Destroy Lonely visual world

chips.label: CYBERPUNK
chips.fragment: cyberpunk neon-drenched megacity, rain-slick streets reflecting holographic billboards, augmented bodies and chrome implants, dense layered urban density

chips.label: MUSIC_VIDEO
chips.fragment: professional music video aesthetic, performance-driven framing centered on the artist, on-beat editing rhythm implied, magazine-cover composition

chips.fragment: neo-noir film stock, deep crushed shadows, venetian-blind shadow patterns, cigarette smoke in cold lamplight, fatalistic prestige mood

chips.fragment: raw documentary cinematography, observational verite realism, available natural light only, naturalistic candid framing, 16mm grain

chips.fragment: glitch-art aesthetic, datamoshing pixel sort artifacts, RGB channel separation, digital decay, vaporwave / hyperpop video influence

chips.fragment: recording studio setting, illuminated mixing console, soundproofing foam walls, monitor speakers, behind-the-glass producer view

chips.fragment: city rooftop at night, full skyline backdrop, distant traffic lights twinkling, elevation and openness, wind-blown energy

chips.fragment: interior of a luxury car (G-Wagon or vintage Cadillac), leather seats, dashboard glow on faces, late-night drive energy, rear-view mirror dangling

chips.fragment: nightclub interior, strobe lighting cutting through fog machine haze, crowd silhouettes, DJ booth glow, claustrophobic intimacy

chips.fragment: gothic cathedral interior, vaulted stone ceilings, stained-glass colored light spilling onto the floor, religious silence, vast scale dwarfing the subject

chips.fragment: dark forest at night, moonlight filtering through tree silhouettes, ground fog at ankle level, mysterious folk-horror atmosphere

chips.fragment: vast desert landscape, golden-hour or moonlit dunes, lone figure dwarfed by emptiness, Joshua Tree / Mojave influence

chips.fragment: golden hour lighting, warm 3000K amber sun low in the sky, long shadows raking across the subject, magic-hour atmosphere

chips.fragment: blue hour twilight, deep cyan sky with rim of magenta at the horizon, cold ambient light, post-sunset stillness

chips.label: HARSH_NOON
chips.fragment: harsh midday sun, hard top-down 5600K lighting, dark short shadows under the eyes, sun-bleached colors, Larry Clark / Harmony Korine energy

chips.fragment: deep middle-of-the-night, available light only from practicals — neon signs, streetlamps, screen glow, mystery and shadow

chips.fragment: dawn breaking, soft pink and lilac sky, first cool light, fresh-start energy, dew on surfaces

chips.label: OVERCAST
chips.fragment: overcast diffused daylight, soft shadowless flat lighting, cool gray palette, melancholic loneliness mood

chips.label: ALBUM_COVER
chips.fragment: designed as a 1:1 square album cover, iconic centered composition with breathing room for artist-name and title typography overlay, memorable at thumbnail size, cohesive single dominant image

chips.label: SINGLE_COVER
chips.fragment: single release artwork, focal-point composition optimized for streaming thumbnail readability at small sizes, bold contrast, instant recognizability

chips.label: MIXTAPE_COVER
chips.fragment: mixtape cover artwork, gritty raw DIY photoshopped-collage aesthetic, classic DatPiff / LiveMixtapes era lineage, hand-edited rough energy

chips.label: PROMO_PORTRAIT
chips.fragment: press / promotional artist portrait, editorial magazine-cover composition, deliberate styling, professional fashion-photography polish

chips.label: LYRIC_CARD
chips.fragment: lyric-quote card composition, deliberate empty space in upper or lower third for text overlay, instagram-feed optimized 1:1 or 4:5 framing

chips.label: MERCH_DESIGN
chips.fragment: merch graphic design composition, bold high-contrast iconic image suitable for t-shirt / hoodie / tour-poster print, screenprint-friendly simplicity

chips.label: YT_THUMBNAIL
chips.fragment: YouTube thumbnail composition, high-contrast face-forward framing, exaggerated expressions, attention-grabbing in a crowded feed, click-worthy energy

chips.label: BEHIND_SCENES
chips.fragment: behind-the-scenes candid documentary shot, unposed natural moment captured on-set, intimate authenticity, 35mm grain

chips.label: WIDE_CINEMATIC
chips.fragment: wide cinematic establishing shot framed for 2.39:1 anamorphic, horizontal lens flares, shot on ARRI Alexa Mini LF with Cooke Anamorphic prime

chips.label: CLOSE_UP_RAW
chips.fragment: intimate extreme close-up, f/1.4 shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh, every skin pore and stray hair visible, shot on Sony Venice 2 with 85mm Master Prime

chips.label: DRONE_AERIAL
chips.fragment: aerial drone perspective, sweeping bird's-eye view revealing geometric urban patterns, DJI Inspire 3 cinematic drone footage with smooth gimbal tracking

chips.label: FROZEN_MOMENT
chips.fragment: ultra slow-motion frozen instant, individual water droplets and dust particles suspended mid-air, 1000fps Phantom Flex hyper-detail

chips.label: DUTCH_ANGLE
chips.fragment: dutch-angle composition, tilted horizon for psychological unease, off-kilter expressionist framing recalling Kubrick / Anderson outliers

chips.label: POV_INTIMATE
chips.fragment: first-person POV perspective, eye-level handheld immediacy, immersive subjective viewpoint, GoPro / iPhone aesthetic for raw intimacy

chips.label: FISHEYE
chips.fragment: fisheye lens distortion, exaggerated 180-degree wide-angle warp, skate-video aesthetic, peephole composition with curved horizon

chips.label: LOW_ANGLE_HERO
chips.fragment: low-angle hero shot looking up at the subject, towering dominant composition, sky filling the upper frame, subject framed as god-tier

chips.label: STATIC_HOLD
chips.fragment: static locked-off tripod frame, no camera movement at all, observational stillness while only the subject moves within the frame

chips.label: SLOW_PAN
chips.fragment: slow horizontal lateral pan, languid sweeping motion across the scene, deliberate anticipation build

chips.label: DOLLY_PUSH
chips.fragment: smooth dolly push slowly closing on the subject, gradual emotional intensification, Hitchcock-style controlled approach

chips.label: ORBIT
chips.fragment: orbiting camera circling the subject in full 360-degree reveal, rotating dramatic build, hero shot energy

chips.label: HANDHELD
chips.fragment: raw handheld shaky-cam, documentary verite immediacy, breathing camera with slight motion blur, urgent close energy

chips.label: REALITY_WARP
chips.fragment: reality-warping camera motion, impossible physics, gravity-defying spin, dream-logic movement with morphing perspective

chips.label: WHIP_PAN
chips.fragment: fast whip-pan transition with motion-blur streaks, frenetic music-video editing energy, snap-cut rhythm

chips.label: TRACKING_SHOT
chips.fragment: smooth tracking shot following the subject from the side, gimbal-stabilized pursuit, walking-and-talking energy

chips.label: ZOOM_PULSE
chips.fragment: rhythmic zoom pulse, snap zoom-ins punctuating beats, music-video bass-drop visual rhythm

chips.label: CRASH_ZOOM
chips.fragment: aggressive crash zoom into the subject, vintage 70s grindhouse energy, shocking reveal punctuation
